stories.title: Project Scaffolding and CI Pipeline
acceptanceCriteriaSummary: Given a clean checkout, when `npm install && npm run build` runs, then it exits 0 with no errors
Given a push to any branch, when the CI workflow triggers, then lint and type-check steps pass
Given a new developer, when they follow the README quickstart, then local dev server starts within 5 min
stories.lockedSectionsNote: Sections Acceptance Criteria, Dev Notes, and Testing are LOCKED. External dev tools must not edit them. Populate only the Dev Agent Record section.

stories.title: User Data Model and Database Migration
acceptanceCriteriaSummary: Given a fresh database, when migration runs, then the users table is created with all required columns
Given a valid payload, when User.create() is called, then a row is inserted and the id is returned
Given a duplicate email, when User.create() is called, then a UniqueConstraintError is thrown
stories.lockedSectionsNote: Sections Acceptance Criteria, Dev Notes, and Testing are LOCKED. External dev tools must not edit them. Populate only the Dev Agent Record section.

stories.title: User Authentication — Register, Login, JWT
acceptanceCriteriaSummary: Given valid credentials, when POST /auth/login is called, then a signed JWT is returned with 1-hour expiry
Given an expired JWT, when a protected route is called, then a 401 with message 'Token expired' is returned
Given a new email and password, when POST /auth/register is called, then user is created and JWT returned
stories.lockedSectionsNote: Sections Acceptance Criteria, Dev Notes, and Testing are LOCKED. External dev tools must not edit them. Populate only the Dev Agent Record section.

stories.title: Stripe Payment Integration — Checkout Flow
acceptanceCriteriaSummary: Given a valid cart, when the user clicks Pay, then a Stripe checkout session is created within 2 s
Given a failed payment, when the Stripe webhook fires, then order status is set to payment-failed
Given a successful payment, when webhook fires, then order is confirmed and confirmation email is sent
stories.lockedSectionsNote: Sections Acceptance Criteria, Dev Notes, and Testing are LOCKED. External dev tools must not edit them. Populate only the Dev Agent Record section.
